board.name: VELA_IF310_DVK
board.summary: The Infineon CYW55513 is ultra-lower power, single-chip that supports 1x1 Wi-Fi 6/6E, Bluetooth® Low Energy 5.3, Matter, IP networking, with integrated PMU, targeted at Internet-of-Things (IoT) applications for stand-alone operation or to offload a host-processor. An integrated 192 MHz Arm® Cortex®-CM33, Bluetooth® LE 5.3 and supports a wide array of peripherals. <p/> The CYW55513 is a low-power, single-chip device that supports single-stream, tri-band((2.4 GHz, and 5-7 GHz)), Wi-Fi 6/6E, IEEE 802.11ax-compliant Wi-Fi MAC/baseband/radio and Bluetooth® Low Energy 5.3. In 802.11ax mode, the device supports rates up to 1024 QAM MCS11 in 20 MHz channels.
board.prov_capabilities: arduino bsp_gen4 bt cat5 cyw55513 cyw55xxx cyw955513evk_01 flash_0k hal i2c i2s led low_power mcu_gp memory pdm qspi rtc sdio pot spi sram_768k switch tdm uart wifi
board.description:
Kit Features:
  • Arduino compatible headers for hardware expansion.
  • On-board sensors - A Digital Ambient Light Sensor (TSL25403) and a Potentiometer.
  • Two IFX PDM Microphone (IM69D130) and one Analog Microphone (IM73A135).
  • User switches and LEDs
  • USB Type-C connector for power, programming, and USB-UART bridge

Kit Contents:
  • CYW55513 evaluation board
  • M.2 to FFC adapter board
  • 30-pin FFC cable
  • USB Type-C to Type-C cable
  • Six jumper wires (5 inches each)
  • Quick Start Guide
